tools.name: solana_get_balance
tools.description: Get the native SOL balance of a Solana wallet address

tools.name: solana_get_nft
tools.description: Get NFT metadata using the Metaplex DAS (Digital Asset Standard) API. Requires a Helius API key set via HELIUS_API_KEY env var, or returns the call pattern for manual use.

tools.name: solana_get_nfts_by_owner
tools.description: Get all NFTs (compressed and standard) owned by a Solana address using the Metaplex DAS API. Requires HELIUS_API_KEY env var.

tools.name: solana_get_price
tools.description: Get the current USD price of a Solana token from Jupiter Price API v3. Requires the token mint address (e.g. 'So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112' for SOL).

tools.name: solana_get_slot
tools.description: Get the current slot height of the Solana network

tools.name: solana_get_token_accounts
tools.description: Get all SPL token accounts owned by a Solana wallet address, including balances and mint addresses

tools.name: solana_get_token_info
tools.description: Get metadata for an SPL token by its mint address, including name, symbol, decimals, and logo from the Jupiter token list

tools.name: solana_get_tps
tools.description: Get the current transactions per second (TPS) on the Solana network by sampling recent performance data

tools.name: solana_get_transaction
tools.description: Get details of a Solana transaction by its signature, including status, block time, and instructions

tools.name: solana_get_yield
tools.description: Get current yield/APY information for Solana DeFi staking protocols including Marinade, Jito, BlazeStake, and native staking

tools.name: solana_resolve_domain
tools.description: Resolve a .sol (Solana Name Service) domain to its owner wallet address using the Bonfida SNS proxy

tools.name: solana_stake
tools.description: Get instructions for staking SOL with a validator. Returns the step-by-step process (does not execute the transaction).

tools.name: solana_swap
tools.description: Get a swap quote from Jupiter aggregator for trading between two Solana tokens. Returns route, price impact, and estimated output amount.

tools.name: solana_transfer
tools.description: Get instructions for transferring SOL between two addresses. Returns the transaction structure (does not execute).

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "solana_get_nft" references sensitive artifacts (env var, api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
